creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
Something wrong with mail.
here are config.log, config.h, config.mak again

>
># config.log
>
>x264 configure script
>Command line options: "--extra-cflags=-I/usr/local/include" "--extra-ldflags=-L/usr/local/lib" "--enable-static" "--enable-shared" "--disable-opencl" "--enable-debug" "--enable-visualize"
>
>checking whether gcc works... yes
>checking whether gcc supports for( int i = 0; i < 9; i++ ); with -std=gnu99... yes
>checking for pthread.h... yes
>checking for return log2f(2); in math.h... no
>Failed commandline was:
>--------------------------------------------------
>gcc conftest.c -pipe -g -Wall -I. -I$(SRCPATH) -I/usr/local/include -std=gnu99 -Werror   -fstack-protector -L/usr/local/lib -lm -pthread -o conftest
>cc1: warnings being treated as errors
>conftest.c:1: warning: -fstack-protector not supported for this target

>Failed program was:
>--------------------------------------------------
>#include <math.h>
>int main () { return log2f(2); return 0; }
>--------------------------------------------------
>checking for XOpenDisplay(0); in X11/Xlib.h... yes
>checking for sws_init_context(0,0,0); in libswscale/swscale.h... no
>Failed commandline was:
>--------------------------------------------------
>gcc conftest.c -pipe -g -Wall -I. -I$(SRCPATH) -I/usr/local/include -std=gnu99 -I/usr/X11R6/include  -lswscale -lavutil  -L/usr/X11R6/lib -lX11  -fstack-protector -L/usr/local/lib -lm -pthread -o conftest
>conftest.c:1: warning: -fstack-protector not supported for this target

>--------------------------------------------------
>#include <libswscale/swscale.h>
>int main () { sws_init_context(0,0,0); return 0; }
>--------------------------------------------------
>checking for -lpostproc... no
>Failed commandline was:
>--------------------------------------------------
>gcc conftest.c -pipe -g -Wall -I. -I$(SRCPATH) -I/usr/local/include -std=gnu99 -I/usr/X11R6/include -lpostproc  -L/usr/X11R6/lib -lX11  -fstack-protector -L/usr/local/lib -lm -pthread -o conftest
>conftest.c:1: warning: -fstack-protector not supported for this target
>/usr/bin/ld: cannot find -lpostproc

>gcc conftest.c -pipe -g -Wall -I. -I$(SRCPATH) -I/usr/local/include -std=gnu99 -I/usr/X11R6/include  -lffms2 -lstdc++ -L. -lavformat -lm -lz -lbz2 -pthread  -L/usr/X11R6/lib -lX11  -fstack-protector -L/usr/local/lib -lm -pthread -o conftest
>conftest.c:1: warning: -fstack-protector not supported for this target

>checking for gpac/isomedia.h... yes
>checking for gf_isom_set_pixel_aspect_ratio(0,0,0,0,0); in gpac/isomedia.h... yes

>Failed commandline was:
>--------------------------------------------------
>gcc conftest.c -pipe -g -Wall -I. -I$(SRCPATH) -I/usr/local/include -std=gnu99 -I/usr/X11R6/include -Werror -lgpac -lz  -L/usr/X11R6/lib -lX11  -fstack-protector -L/usr/local/lib -lm -pthread -o conftest
>cc1: warnings being treated as errors

>--------------------------------------------------

>int main () { void *p; p = gf_malloc(1); gf_free(p); return 0; }

>
>platform:      IA64
>system:        FREEBSD
>cli:           yes
>libx264:       internal
>shared:        yes
>static:        yes
>asm:           no
>interlaced:    yes
>avs:           no
>lavf:          no
>ffms:          no
>gpac:          yes
>gpl:           yes
>thread:        posix
>opencl:        no
>filters:       crop select_every 
>debug:         yes
>gprof:         no
>strip:         no
>PIC:           yes
>visualize:     yes
>bit depth:     8
>chroma format: all
>
># config.h
>
>
>#define ARCH_IA64 1
>#define SYS_FREEBSD 1
>#define HAVE_POSIXTHREAD 1
>#define HAVE_THREAD 1
>#define HAVE_VISUALIZE 1
>#define HAVE_GPAC 1
>#define HAVE_VECTOREXT 1
>#define fseek fseeko
>#define ftell ftello
>#define HAVE_GPL 1
>#define HAVE_INTERLACED 1
>#define HAVE_MALLOC_H 0
>#define HAVE_ALTIVEC 0
>#define HAVE_ALTIVEC_H 0
>#define HAVE_MMX 0
>#define HAVE_ARMV6 0
>#define HAVE_ARMV6T2 0
>#define HAVE_NEON 0
>#define HAVE_BEOSTHREAD 0
>#define HAVE_WIN32THREAD 0
>#define HAVE_LOG2F 0
>#define HAVE_SWSCALE 0
>#define HAVE_LAVF 0
>#define HAVE_FFMS 0
>#define HAVE_GF_MALLOC 0
>#define HAVE_AVS 0
>#define HAVE_CPU_COUNT 0
>#define HAVE_OPENCL 0
>
>
># config.mak
>
>
>SRCPATH=.
>prefix=/usr/local
>exec_prefix=${prefix}
>bindir=${exec_prefix}/bin
>libdir=${exec_prefix}/lib
>includedir=${prefix}/include
>ARCH=IA64
>SYS=FREEBSD
>CC=gcc
>CFLAGS=-Wshadow -O1 -g -pipe -g -Wall -I. -I$(SRCPATH) -I/usr/local/include -std=gnu99 -I/usr/X11R6/include -fPIC -fno-tree-vectorize
>DEPMM=-MM -g0
>DEPMT=-MT
>LD=gcc -o 
>LDFLAGS=-L/usr/X11R6/lib -lX11  -fstack-protector -L/usr/local/lib -lm -pthread
>LIBX264=libx264.a
>AR=ar rc 
>RANLIB=ranlib
>STRIP=strip
>AS=
>ASFLAGS= -DHAVE_ALIGNED_STACK=1 -DPIC -DHIGH_BIT_DEPTH=0 -DBIT_DEPTH=8
>RC=
>RCFLAGS=
>EXE=
>HAVE_GETOPT_LONG=1
>DEVNULL=/dev/null
>PROF_GEN_CC=-fprofile-generate
>PROF_GEN_LD=-fprofile-generate
>PROF_USE_CC=-fprofile-use
>PROF_USE_LD=-fprofile-use
>HAVE_OPENCL=no
>default: cli
>install: install-cli
>SOSUFFIX=so
>SONAME=libx264.so.136
>SOFLAGS=-shared -Wl,-soname,$(SONAME)  -Wl,-Bsymbolic
>default: lib-shared
>install: install-lib-shared
>default: lib-static
>install: install-lib-static
>LDFLAGSCLI = -lgpac -lz 
>CLI_LIBX264 = $(LIBX264)
>
>
